meta.name: Strong's Hebrew (partial)
meta.note: Starter lexicon — ~50 high-frequency entries. Full ~8674-entry corpus is a follow-up.

H1.def: a primitive word; father, in a literal and immediate, or figurative and remote application.

H120.def: ruddy, i.e., a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.).

H157.def: a primitive root; to have affection for (sexually or otherwise).

H216.def: illumination or (concrete) luminary (in every sense, including lightning, happiness, etc.).

H410.def: strength; as adjective mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity).

H430.def: plural of H433; gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God.

H571.def: contracted from H539; stability; (figuratively) certainty, truth, trustworthiness.

H530.def: literally firmness; figuratively security; morally fidelity.

H776.def: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm; the earth (at large, or partitively a land).

H1121.def: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship).

H1242.def: properly, dawn (as the break of day); generally, morning.

H1254.def: a primitive root; (absolutely) to create; (qualified) to cut down (a wood), select, feed (as formative processes).

H1288.def: a primitive root; to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man.

H1697.def: from H1696; a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause.

H1732.def: from the same as H1730; loving; David, the youngest son of Jesse.

H2403.def: from H2398; an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation.

H2451.def: from H2449; wisdom (in a good sense).

H2580.def: from H2603; graciousness, i.e., subjective (kindness, favor) or objective (beauty).

H2617.def: from H2616; kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof.

H2896.def: from H2895; good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun.

H3068.def: from H1961; (the) self-Existent or Eternal; Jeho-vah, Jewish national name of God.

H3091.def: from H3068 and H3467; Jehovah-saved; Jehoshua, the Jewish leader.

H3117.def: from an unused root meaning to be hot; a day (as the warm hours).

H3290.def: from H6117; heel-catcher (i.e., supplanter); Jaakob, the Israelitish patriarch.

H3389.def: founded peaceful; Jerushalaim or Jerushalem, the capital city of Palestine.

H3444.def: feminine passive participle of H3467; something saved, i.e., (abstractly) deliverance.

H3478.def: from H8280 and H410; he will rule as God; Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also of his posterity.

H3548.def: active participle of H3547; literally one officiating, a priest.

H3820.def: a form of H3824; the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect.

H4325.def: dual of a primitive noun; water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen.

H4872.def: from H4871; drawing out (of the water), i.e., rescued; Mosheh, the Israelite lawgiver.

H4899.def: from H4886; anointed; usually a consecrated person (as a king, priest, or saint); specifically, the Messiah.

H5315.def: from H5314; properly, a breathing creature, i.e., animal or (abstractly) vitality.

H5769.def: from H5956; properly, concealed, i.e., the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind.

H5971.def: from H6004; a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel).

H6213.def: a primitive root; to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application.

H6310.def: from H6284; the mouth (as the means of blowing), whether literal or figurative.

H6440.def: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun; the face (as the part that turns).

H6664.def: from H6663; the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity.

H6918.def: from H6942; sacred (ceremonially or morally); (as noun) God (by eminence), an angel, a saint.

H7225.def: from the same as H7218; the first, in place, time, order or rank.

H7307.def: from H7306; wind; by resemblance breath, i.e., a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality.

H7563.def: from H7561; morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person.

H7965.def: from H7999; safe, i.e., (figuratively) well, happy, friendly; also (abstractly) welfare.

H8034.def: a primitive word (perhaps rather from H7760 through the idea of definite and conspicuous position); an appellation.

H8064.def: from an unused root meaning to be lofty; the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve).

H8085.def: a primitive root; to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.).

H8104.def: a primitive root; properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e., guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.

H8451.def: from H3384; a precept or statute, especially the Decalogue or Pentateuch.
